titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: School of Hotel Administration Associate Dean for Academic Affairs records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration. Associate Dean for Academic Affairs

did.abstract: Includes reports, committee meeting minutes, correspondence, publications, and subject files pertaining to curriculum development and the Associate Dean for Academic Affairs Office.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes reports, committee meeting minutes, correspondence, publications, and subject files pertaining to curriculum development and the Associate Dean for Academic Affairs Office.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: School of Hotel Administration Associate Dean for Academic Affairs Records, #28-1-2411. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

controlaccess.subject: Hotel management schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.

did.unittitle: Faculty Search: Real Estate/Project Development Advertisements
Faculty Search: Real Estate/Project Development Search Plan
Faculty Search Committee Minutes and Correspondence
Penner - "Hotel Planning: Typical Guest Room Floor"
Goodman - "Use of Critical-Incident Methodology to Waiter/Waitress Training"
Sherry - "Legal Aspects of Travel and Tourism"
Cantwell/Chase - "Expansion and Reconstruction of CU Restaurant Simulation"
Eyster - "Statistical Decision Theory Applied to Hotel Overbooking Problems"
Ferguson - "Economic Impact of the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974"
Eyster - "Cash Flow Management Procedures in Use in Hotel Industry"
Burtt/Geller - "Survey of Hedging in Hotel Industry"
Tabacchi/Goldstein - "Survey of Hedging in Hotel Industry"
Mutkoski/Redlin - "Cooking Meat in Bags in Water"
Eyster/Geller - "Capital Budgeting Techniques in the Hospitality Industry"
Beals - Critical Review of Hotel Feasibility Studies"
Tabacchi/Schneider - "Industry Use of Frozen Bread Dough/Functional Properties of Gluten"
Kaven/Eyster - "Analysis of the US Domestic Hotel Management Contract Agreements"
Professor Mrs Yang Ja Yoo - Seoul, Korea
Correspondence on Japanese Students Seeking Admission
Correspondence on Korean Students Seeking Admission
Committee on Academic Records and Registration
Curriculum Committee Review - Documents and Minutes
Beth Carlson Ganem - Better Living Concept
Hotel Ezra Cornell Historical Files, Including Managing Directors Club
Retired Faculty or Faculty Who Have Resigned:
American Assembly of Collegiate Schools of Business
Guns, Germs, and Steel Orientation Student Discussion
Proposed New Require Core for BS Degree
